notes.torch: 2.2.2+cu121 - Required for compatibility with other software
notes.coqui-tts: Current release w/ XTTS v2 engine
notes.transformers: Stable with XTTS v2 and PyTorch 2.2.2
notes.librosa: Audio feature extraction for XTTS and QC
notes.numpy: Perfect bridge between PyTorch 2.2.2 and Librosa 0.11

legacy_engines.openvoice: Keep isolated in own venv - conflicts with NumPy 1.26+ & PyTorch 2.2.2
legacy_engines.tortoise-tts: Use separate venv if needed for legacy tests
legacy_engines.melotts: Legacy; not needed for XTTS v2

warnings: Do not downgrade librosa, numpy, or transformers - XTTS will break
Legacy engines must be isolated in separate venvs
Torch and Torchaudio versions must match exactly
PyTorch 2.2.2+cu121 is the standard for compatibility with other software
Do not upgrade PyTorch without testing all engines and dependencies
